checks.rationale: Invalidity wording is compared as advisory marker evidence only; it does not determine amendment legal effect.
Comparison fails closed on malformed hierarchy JSONL records.

non_claims: Consultant hierarchy prior-art comparison is a deterministic safeguard only.
Comparison results do not claim legal correctness or authoritative legal interpretation.
Comparison results do not claim parser completeness.
Prior-art mismatches are evidence anchors for review, not legal conclusions.
